title: hw.dp_ecm.telemetry
description: Decoded DP-ECM frame published by drs-bridge to hw.<variant>.telemetry topics. The `frame` object contains the output of parse_message() — fixed envelope fields (frame_type, group_id, unit_id, status) plus open per-unit payload fields decoded to SI units (Hz, dBm, seconds). All multi-byte integers in the wire format are little-endian; the JSON values are already host-converted. Applies to both hw.dp_ecm_hf.telemetry (DP-ECM-1071 HF) and hw.dp_ecm_vu.telemetry (DP-ECM-1074 VU).

instance_id.description: Logical DRS instance id, e.g. 'dp_ecm_hf#1'. Matches drs.roster entry.

variant.description: Parser variant that decoded this frame.

timestamp_ns.description: Wall-clock time (nanoseconds since Unix epoch) when the frame was received by drs-bridge.

frame.description: parse_message() output. Fixed envelope fields are always present; payload fields are open and vary per (group_id, unit_id).

group_id.description: ICD group number. Known groups: 100 diagnostics, 101 detection, 106/200 jamming, 109 date-time, 111 signal/scan, 112 fast-scan.

unit_id.description: ICD unit number within the group.

status.description: Signed int16 status field, present on response frames (frame_type=2). ICD convention: 0=OK.
